data.current_description: Search for securities by company name or symbol.
data.description_suggestion: Search for securities by company name or symbol. Accepts partial matches and returns a list of matching securities with their symbols, names, and exchange information. Useful for discovering securities before adding to watchlists or placing trades.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about input expectations (partial vs exact match), return format, and use cases. Adding details about matching behavior and return structure improves AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'lookupSecurity' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is minimal and doesn't explain what information is returned or the expected input format. data.current_description: Lookup a security by symbol.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve detailed information for a specific security by its symbol. Returns security details including name, exchange, type, and other identifying information. Requires a valid security symbol as input.
data.reasoning: Description is minimal and doesn't explain what information is returned or the expected input format. Enhanced description clarifies the return value structure and input requirements for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Create a new watchlist.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new watchlist for the authenticated user. Accepts a watchlist name and optional list of security symbols to add initially. Returns the newly created watchlist object with its ID and contents. The watchlist is immediately available for use.
data.reasoning: Description lacks essential details about required/optional inputs, return value structure, and side effects. Enhanced description clarifies input parameters, return format, and immediate availability for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getWatchlist' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is too vague about what information is returned and error conditions. Enhanced description specifies return structure and error handling to improve AI agent understanding of expected outcomes.

data.current_description: Retrieve a specific watchlist.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a specific watchlist by ID for the authenticated user. Returns the watchlist details including its name, creation date, and all contained security symbols. Returns an error if the watchlist does not exist or is not accessible.
data.reasoning: Description is too vague about what information is returned and error conditions. Enhanced description specifies return structure and error handling to improve AI agent understanding of expected outcomes.

message: Operation 'updateWatchlist' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity about input parameters, update behavior (partial vs full replacement), and return value. Enhanced description clarifies that partial updates are supported and specifies return format for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Update watchlist name or symbols.
data.description_suggestion: Update an existing watchlist by modifying its name and/or security symbols. Accepts the watchlist ID and new name and/or symbol list. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified. Returns the updated watchlist object reflecting all changes.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about input parameters, update behavior (partial vs full replacement), and return value. Enhanced description clarifies that partial updates are supported and specifies return format for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'deleteWatchlist' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks information about side effects (permanent deletion) and return value. data.current_description: Delete a watchlist.
data.description_suggestion: Delete a watchlist by ID for the authenticated user. Permanently removes the watchlist and all its contents. Returns a success confirmation. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description lacks information about side effects (permanent deletion) and return value. Enhanced description clarifies the irreversible nature of the operation and confirms successful deletion for better AI agent understanding of consequences.

data.current_description: Retrieve balance information for a specific account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve current balance information for a specific account, including cash balance, buying power, and account equity. Requires the account ID as a path parameter. Returns detailed balance metrics for the specified account.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what balance information is returned (cash, buying power, equity, etc.). Added clarity about required parameters and return value details to improve AI agent understanding of what data will be available.

data.current_description: Retrieve current positions for a specific account.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all open positions held in a specific account, including equity and options positions. Requires the account ID as a path parameter. Returns position details including symbol, quantity, entry price, and current market value.
data.reasoning: Description is vague about position types and return data. Added context about what types of positions are included (equity and options) and key fields returned to help AI agents understand the scope and utility of this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve account transaction history.
